_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting deriviative classification IAW organization standards/Policy
reference_document_element_description: Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk category determination, applicable requirements identification, and conformity assessment pathway selection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-003 (DA, cosine: 0.505), RC-S-008 (RC, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.420). Shared vocabulary: [classification]. DCWF-only terms [conducting, deriviative, iaw, organization, policy, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [act, ai, applicable, assessment, category, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.832 (P=0.825, R=0.839). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in conducting deriviative classification IAW organization standards/Policy" and "Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk cate" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 > STS 0.420 (gap +0.109). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [classification] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Shared tokens: [classification]. DCWF-only: [conducting, deriviative, iaw, organization, policy, skill]. WIDAI-only: [act, ai, applicable, assessment, category, conduct].
